title: Delicious Pul Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and tender chicken stir fry dish made with pul chicken, biber pepper, and floral herbs. Perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Floral Herbs
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro

instructions: Marinate the pul chicken in a mixture of soy sauce, garlic, and ginger for at least 30 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add sliced biber pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the chicken to the skillet or wok and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Stir in chopped floral herbs and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
